title: Nickel and Diming Your GAN: A Dual-Method Approach to Enhancing GAN Efficiency via Knowledge Distillation
one_liner: Two methods — DiME and NICKEL — that compress StyleGAN2 by 99% while keeping its image quality intact.
tldr: DiME distills GANs by matching distributions in foundation-model embeddings via MMD; NICKEL keeps the student generator and discriminator talking through interactive compression. Together they reach FID 10.45 at 95.73% compression on FFHQ and still hold up at 99.69%.
